Pricing FAQs

What does "flat-rate pricing" mean?

Exactly what it sounds like. The price we quote is the final price. No surge fees, no hidden charges, no surprises. Whether it's rush hour or 3 AM, you pay the same rate.

How do I get an exact quote?

Use our online booking form, call (832) 567-8050, or email adam@avalimo.net. We typically respond within minutes.

Do you charge for waiting time?

Airport pickups include 30 minutes of complimentary wait time after landing. For hourly bookings, wait time is built into your package.

Is a deposit required?

Yes, a booking deposit secures your reservation. Your deposit is fully refundable with 24-hour cancellation notice.

Ready for a Quote?

Get your instant flat-rate quote — no obligation, no surprises.

Get Instant Quote Call (832) 567-8050
